version: Exam questions align to the Summer '24 release

testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Kryterion Webassessor

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Salesforce org. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Salesforce releases three major updates per year. For each release, certified professionals must complete a free maintenance module on Trailhead to retain their certification. No cost for maintenance.
target_audience: Salesforce customers, partners, and employees who want to demonstrate their skills and knowledge in designing, building, and implementing quoting flows through the Salesforce CPQ platform.
recommended_experience: 1 year of experience in a CPQ Administrator role.

retake_policy.notes: Retake available after scheduling (no mandatory waiting period for first retake). Retake fee ~$100 for most exams.

objectives.title: Design, configure, and troubleshoot Price Rules using lookup objects and formula fields to meet business requirements.
Apply understanding of quote calculation sequence and Quote Line pricing fields to meet pricing and business requirements.
Utilize out-of-the-box and custom permissions, record types, field sets, and page layouts to ensure users can fulfill their job requirements.
Given a business process, demonstrate knowledge of CPQ data flow (for example, twin fields) across CPQ objects.
Demonstrate knowledge about the CPQ object data model as it relates to data migration.
Set up CPQ for localization and multi-currency for international customers and users.
Given a scenario, determine the necessary CPQ package-level settings.
Determine how the CPQ managed package fits within a Salesforce org.
Given a scenario, set up a bundle structure to meet business requirements.
Given a scenario, set up Product Rules to meet business requirements.
Given a scenario, identify the appropriate pricing strategy (Discount Schedules, Block Prices, Contracted Prices, subscription pricing, percent-of-total).
Given a scenario, determine expected pricing outcomes.
Given a scenario, set up a Quote Template to meet business requirements.
Given a scenario, use Search Filters, field sets, and Custom Actions to enable product selection and configuration.
Demonstrate understanding of the data required to generate Orders and Contracts.
Demonstrate understanding of how to generate renewal and amendment Quotes to meet business requirements.
Given a scenario, recommend when to use Orders, Contracts, Subscriptions, and Assets to meet business requirements.
Demonstrate how to set up Products, Price Books, and Price Book Entries.
Demonstrate how product catalog setup impacts overall CPQ data flow.
Select and set up native or Advanced Approvals to meet business requirements.

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Trailhead
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning platform with trails aligned to each certification

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Exam Guide & Sample Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Free exam guides with sample questions on each credential page
